Software Engineer

Southern Cross Tech
Melbourne VIC
remote
$60,000 - $80,000 a year
Posted 3 days ago

Southern Cross Tech is seeking a Software Engineer to build reliable services and customer-facing product features. This remote role is based in Melbourne VIC and includes a competitive salary range of $60,000 - $80,000 a year.

You will work with a product team, contribute to code reviews, and support delivery of modern web applications.
